verdicts.reason: Apollo's questions appear to revisit topics the student already taught clearly, as indicated by his understanding of both the continuity principle and Bernoulli's equation. His questions don't directly target concepts specifically marked as unresolved or misconceived. Moreover, all clarification exchanges were denied credit, suggesting no further credit should have been granted in the ledger, maintaining consistency in marking Apollo's understanding as complete.

All questions that were denied credit in the clarification trace indeed align with those queries that remained unresolved in the ledger, while all interactions that were granted credit are marked as resolved and addressed correctly.
